Advancy PartnersHomepage

Sydney - Strategy Consultant (1-3 years experience)

  • On-site
    • Sydney, New South Wales, Australia
  • Consultants

Advancy is recruiting exceptional candidates with a background in strategy consulting, investment banking or other relevant experience who are ready to accelerate their careers!

Job description

Are you high-performing, passionate and curious? Do you want to solve interesting and challenging real world business problems? Are you looking to jump start your career by working alongside C-suite and private equity executives?

If so, apply now for our 2026 Associate Consultant and Consultant roles with Advancy Australia. We are currently hiring professionals with 1-3 years of experience in strategy consulting, investment banking or other relevant industries.

Who we are

Advancy is a leading, global boutique strategy consulting firm with 9 offices around the world. The founding partners of our Sydney office garnered their experience from Bain & Co and the Boston Consulting Group and have since solved critical business problems to help shape Australia’s leading organisations. Whilst enjoying the benefits of being part of a global network, our unique working philosophy in Sydney allows us to maintain a truly boutique culture.

In Australia we focus on corporate strategy and private equity projects across the consumer goods, food and beverage, retail, healthcare and industrials sectors. Our clients include some of the world's best FMCG brands and Australian private equity funds such as PEP, Quadrant and BGH.

The consulting experience at Advancy

  • Interesting and challenging strategic work with leading companies

  • The opportunity to continue your career in management consulting, but in a much more entrepreneurial environment where you will help build the company

  • Fast-track promotion opportunities

  • A more balanced lifestyle. We recognise that doing impactful work can be balanced with other pursuits and interests in life

  • An attractive salary package in line with global strategy consulting firms

  • Opportunities to work in other Advancy offices globally

Why join Advancy Australia?

  • Outstanding learning environment – Advancy is committed to your professional development with formal training, frequent feedback and day-to-day access to partners and senior clients. Our premium positioning means we work principally at the c-suite and board level

  • Breadth of experience – You will gain experience across a range of industries through corporate strategy and private equity projects

  • Making a difference – Entrepreneurial thinking and risk taking are part of our culture. There is no premium for job titles or age, you will have the opportunity to make an impact from day one and fast-track to manager in 4 years

  • Commitment to diverse talent – We foster an inclusive culture where consultants from all backgrounds can thrive, supported by initiatives like the #StrongHer mentorship program and the Advancy Women in Asia (AWIA) network

  • Competitive salary package – We ensure our packages are aligned with the best paying strategy consulting firms in Australia. We also reward loyalty, with the opportunity to partake in our Share Ownership Plan after 1 year full-time with the firm

  • Opportunities for exchanges – The ability for secondment to our other offices, such as Paris, London and New York

  • Balanced lifestyle – We work mainly from our own offices, including reasonable work-from-home and remote work, and offer additional benefits such as extra annual leave

  • Fun, stimulating work environment – Join a friendly, relaxed and supportive work culture. We hold frequent ‘out of office’ activities, including a weekly personal trainer, frequent team social gatherings, and an annual strategy retreat

Job requirements

Advancy Australia is the right place for you, if you have:

  • 1-3 years experience with a strategy consulting firm, investment bank or other relevant industry (e.g. Private Equity, FMCG)

  • First class analytical skills and a high level of motivation

  • A strong academic background with a sense of intellectual curiosity

  • The ability to think about complex commercial problems logically and creatively

  • A can-do attitude, patience, and a sense of humour

  • The ability to work as part of a team with outstanding communication and leadership skills

How to Apply

  • Please complete the Application Form with your details, availability, resume, academic transcript and brief cover letter (PDF format only)

  • Applications are now open and reviewed on a rolling basis from when they are submitted.

Please note: As part of our recruitment process, background checks may be conducted. Any discrepancies or misrepresentations could result in disqualification from the process or withdrawal of an offer.
